source: SKY-317 series→dataset backfill plus SKY-356 active-series provenance repair

us-tx-electricity-demand-hourly.evidence: 4 unanimous candidate votes. ERCOT's checked-in real-time generation dashboard also exposes demand, which is why this demand series hangs off the same source.

us-tx-solar-generation-daily.evidence: 6 unanimous candidate votes (+1 null), publisher ERCOT

de-wholesale-electricity-price.evidence: SKY-215's series curation pins Germany wholesale prices to ENTSO-E/EPEX; the checked-in day-ahead price dataset for bidding zones is entsoe-a44-a01.

eu-solar-generation-annual.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins EU solar generation to Ember; the checked-in yearly Ember generation dataset is the cross-country annual source.

global-electricity-generation-annual.evidence: SKY-323 follow-up research explicitly reopens this series onto Ember Electricity Generation Yearly as the canonical checked-in global yearly source.

us-ca-electricity-price-hourly.evidence: 14 of 17 candidate votes point to CAISO Today's Outlook, which stays the checked-in CAISO price surface for this hourly series.

us-electricity-generation-annual.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins U.S. electricity generation to EIA; the checked-in annual generation dataset is eia-generation-us.

eu-coal-generation-annual.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins EU coal generation to Ember; the checked-in yearly Ember generation dataset is the cross-country annual source.

global-battery-pack-price-annual.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins global battery pack price to BloombergNEF's Battery Price Survey.

global-clean-energy-investment-annual.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins global clean energy investment to IEA World Energy Investment.

global-energy-transition-investment-annu.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins global energy transition investment to BloombergNEF Energy Transition Investment.

global-solar-pv-capacity-annual.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins global solar PV capacity to IRENA Renewable Capacity Statistics.

tr-wholesale-electricity-price.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins Turkey wholesale electricity price to Ember; the checked-in Turkey review is the available source artifact.

us-ca-battery-discharge-daily.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins CAISO battery discharge to CAISO Battery Discharge Records.

us-ca-clean-share-daily.evidence: CAISO Today's Outlook is the checked-in CAISO source already used for daily solar and mix views, and it is the best provenance surface for daily clean-share reads.

us-ca-interconnection-queue.evidence: The cold-start catalog still lacks a dedicated CAISO queue dataset; LBNL Queue Analysis is the closest checked-in backlog source and includes CAISO subset coverage.

us-data-center-demand-forecast.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins U.S. data center demand forecasts to BloombergNEF Data Center Demand.

us-interconnection-queue-annual.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins the U.S. interconnection queue series to LBNL Queue Analysis.

us-tx-wind-generation-daily.evidence: The checked-in ERCOT wind report mirror is the available source artifact for daily wind-generation rollups in the cold-start catalog.

za-clean-electricity-share-monthly.evidence: SKY-215's key-series list pins South Africa clean electricity share to Ember; the checked-in monthly Ember generation dataset is the available monthly source.
